body:
Parent issue: #74

Stage: version-metadata-foundation

## Task

Create the first small PR for #74. Implement only the foundation that can land independently on main: document the canonical Sepo version policy using SemVer, v0.x while the public contract is still pre-release, v1.0.0-rc.N only for true release candidates, and v1.0.0 for the public stable release; add committed `.agent/sepo-version.json` metadata for installed Sepo identity with schema_version, version, channel, source_repo, source_ref, source_sha, installed_from, and agent_files_hash semantics, allowing moving-branch development checkouts to represent exact SHA differently from release installs if needed; add typed `.agent/src` helper(s), validation, and a CLI to print installed Sepo version/source identity for workflows and future bug reports; add focused tests; update install/setup docs to explain the metadata file and the fork/install source-identity model. Keep this child scoped: do not implement update workflow rewriting, bug-report integration, or release prepare/publish workflows yet.

## Base

- base_branch: main

<!-- sepo-sub-orchestrator parent:74 stage:version-metadata-foundation state:running parent_round:2 -->

comments.body:
Sepo automation handoff dispatched: `orchestrate` -> `delegate_issue` (round 2/10).

agent planner selected child issue delegation: Use multiple small PRs. #74 spans installed metadata, update/install behavior, bug-report payloads, and release automation; the first child can land independently on main as the shared foundation, while later children can stack on #116/#117 or main after merge.

**Sepo implementation finished**

- Branch: `agent/implement-issue-127/codex-25298398527`
- Pull request: https://github.com/self-evolving/repo/pull/128

Added the Sepo version metadata foundation: committed `.agent/sepo-version.json`, typed validation/loader helpers, a `print-sepo-version` CLI with GitHub Actions outputs, focused tests, and install/setup/versioning docs. Verified with build, focused version tests, CLI JSON output, `git diff --check`, and the full `.agent` test suite with workflow base env unset.

title: Sub-orchestrator: version-metadata-foundation
